hero.sub: Fullstack engineering focused on scalable systems, clean code and precise experiences — from a Go and Node back-end to React and Next.js on the front.
about.head: Driven by well-designed systems and the details that hold a product together.
about.p1: I am a fullstack developer focused on building web products end to end — modeling data, designing APIs in Go and Node, and shipping fast, accessible interfaces in React and Next.js. I pursue code that is predictable, observable and easy to maintain.
about.p2: I work with TypeScript end to end and value testing, performance and a developer experience that makes the next feature simpler than the last.
about.nowpost: , a B2B SaaS — from architecture to product.
proj.desc: A B2B SaaS in development — designed and built end to end, from the data model and APIs to the product interface.
words.q1: Add a testimonial here from a colleague, client or tech lead about what it is like to work with you.
words.q2: Another testimonial can go here — highlight delivery, collaboration or technical impact.
contact.sub: Available for fullstack projects and collaborations. Reach me on any of the channels below.
